ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  "p_vp" REAL /* Price-to-value ratio of the asset */,
  "daily_liquidity" REAL /* Daily liquidity of the asset */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, fund) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the asset data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the asset is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset this metric applies to */,
  "star_dy" INTEGER /* Indicator if the asset has a star dividend yield */,
  "star_pvp" INTEGER /* Indicator if the asset has a star price-to-value ratio */,
  "star_dl" INTEGER /* Indicator if the asset has star daily liquidity */,
  "star_nw" INTEGER /* Indicator if the asset has a star net worth */,
  "historical_performance" TEXT /* Historical performance data */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the metrics */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metrics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metrics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing this portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-asset association */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Cost basis of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the portfolio-asset association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the asset (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factors */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the risk assessment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the compliance check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance check */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment opportunity */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related asset */,
  "potential_return" REAL /* Estimated potential return on investment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the opportunity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the investment opportunity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the investment opportunity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investment opportunity (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_opportunities_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio-asset associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Any transaction fees */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_asset_id") REFERENCES portfolio_assets ("portfolio_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated asset */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., dividend yield, net worth) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the alert */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the report is generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing portfolio performance */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_assets" (
  "user_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-asset association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user tracking the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being tracked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user-asset association */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Last time the user viewed the asset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes the user has on the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_assets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
